query:
SELECT c.contract_no, c.installment_count, c.installment_amount, c.finance_amount,
       COUNT(i.id) as inst_count_in_db,
       SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_json, '$.amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total_amount_sum,
       c.status
FROM contracts c
LEFT JOIN installments i ON i.contract_external_id = c.external_id
WHERE c.contract_no = 'CT0824-NRT001-00010-01'
GROUP BY c.id;
command:
